##NAMES=Lillianite
##RRUFFID=R110141
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Pb_3-2x_Ag_x_Bi_2+x_S_6_
##LOCALITY=Pedro claim, King County, Washington, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rob Lavinsky
##DESCRIPTION=Elongated prismatic silver gray metallic crystal, with severe exterior corrosion associated with aikinite, galena, neyite, and gustavite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110141

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
